overall.description: Game engine footage from GTA V depicting a walking tour through the Sandy Shores desert community. The camera moves through a dusty rural setting with mobile homes, palm trees, and scattered vegetation, passing a roadside BBQ gathering and ending in a narrow back alley between weathered buildings.

events.description: white and maroon vintage van drives past from right to left
camera begins walking forward along the road

agents.ego_description: standing near trailer home then beginning to walk along the desert road

notable_agents.action: vintage camper van with white body and maroon stripe driving past the camera

entered.detail: vintage camper van with white body and maroon stripe
white and red mobile home with wooden skirting and steps
wooden power poles with multiple crossbars and wires
dry desert bushes and small cacti along the roadside

segments.scene_description: The scene opens at a desert trailer park with a white and red mobile home on the left. A vintage maroon and white van drives past on the right, then the camera begins walking forward along the paved road. Utility poles line the road into the hazy distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: desert road with palm tree lining

events.description: black sedan passes from left to right across the intersection
quad bike approaches from the distance and passes by on the left

agents.ego_description: walking steadily down the paved desert road toward the intersection

notable_agents.action: black sedan driving across the intersection from left to right
ATV quad bike approaching from down the road and passing by

entered.detail: small white chapel-like structure with steeple in the distance
tall palm trees lining the left side of the road

segments.scene_description: Walking along the desert road lined with palm trees on the left. A black car passes in the distance, followed by a quad bike that approaches and passes by. A white church-like building stands in the hazy distance ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: desert road approaching informal roadside gathering

events.description: camera turns right toward the BBQ gathering under the canopy
moving from paved road onto dirt area with the canopy gathering

agents.ego_description: following the quad bike then turning right off the road toward a group of people gathered under a canopy

notable_agents.action: person riding quad bike continuing down the paved road away from camera
group of people gathered under black canopy for outdoor BBQ

entered.detail: large black patio umbrella sheltering picnic tables and chairs
large parabolic satellite dish on the ground near the road

segments.scene_description: Continuing down the road past the quad bike, then turning right toward a roadside BBQ gathering. A large black canopy shelters people socializing near a satellite dish. The ground transitions from asphalt to dirt as the camera approaches the group.

scene_state.functional_zone: informal outdoor BBQ gathering under canopy

events.description: walking through the group of people socializing and grilling

agents.ego_description: walking through the BBQ gathering, passing between people sitting in folding chairs and standing under the canopy

notable_agents.action: man in orange pants standing near the canopy edge
woman sitting in folding chair next to the barbecue grill

entered.detail: black kettle barbecue grill on wheels near the canopy
metal folding chairs arranged in a circle under the canopy

segments.scene_description: Moving through the informal BBQ gathering under the large black canopy. People are seated in folding chairs and standing around, with a kettle grill visible. The camera passes close to the group on the dirt ground before exiting the gathering area.

scene_state.functional_zone: desert road with satellite dish installation

events.description: leaving the dirt BBQ area back onto the paved road
turning left off the paved road onto a dirt path between buildings

agents.ego_description: leaving the BBQ area and walking along the road past large satellite dishes before turning onto a dirt alley

entered.detail: two large parabolic satellite dishes facing the sky near a fence
large pile of excavated dirt and gravel near the satellite dishes

segments.scene_description: Exiting the BBQ area onto the paved road, passing large satellite dishes and a dirt mound on the right. The camera continues along the road then turns left onto a narrow dirt path between wooden fences and weathered buildings.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow dirt alley between rural buildings

events.description: exiting the narrow alley into a more open area with commercial buildings

agents.ego_description: walking down a narrow dirt alley between wooden fences and weathered buildings, exiting to a main road area

entered.detail: weathered wooden privacy fence with vertical planks
metal chain link fence with wooden posts
aging wooden house with peeling paint and boarded windows
small red wooden structure visible behind the fence

segments.scene_description: Walking down a narrow dirt alley enclosed by wooden fences on the left and chain link fences on the right. Weathered wooden buildings line the path. The camera continues straight and exits the alley into an open area with a commercial building and parked car visible ahead.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a dusty desert community that transitions from an open trailer park road into a secluded back alley. It begins by walking past a red and white mobile home as a vintage maroon van drives by, moving forward along a paved road lined with utility poles and palm trees. As the camera proceeds toward a distant white church-like building, it passes a quad bike before turning right, where the asphalt gives way to dirt at a roadside BBQ gathering sheltered by a large black canopy. The scene then shifts back onto the paved road, passing large satellite dishes and a dirt mound before turning left into a narrow dirt path. Finally, the camera moves between weathered wooden buildings and chain link fences, exiting the enclosed alley into an open area with a commercial building and a parked car.
